name: node-interpret
title: node-interpret
summary: dictionary of file extensions and associated module loaders
description:
dictionary of file extensions and associated module loaders
This is used by Liftoff to automatically require dependencies for
configuration files, and by rechoir for registering module loaders.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-interpret because dictionary of file extensions and associated module loaders.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-interpret as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-interpret with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-interpret --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
